tweets.text: Interesting gap: Blockstream Satellite lets you receive Bitcoin blocks without internet, but there's no uplink path. If your internet is destroyed or controlled, you can verify transactions but can't send them.

A low-cost satellite modem could relay signed transactions via Iridium short burst data to a relay node with internet access. The hardware exists. The integration doesn't. Builders who know satellite comms — this one's for you.

github.com/FGUTech/libertas/issues/112
